spaceSwitcher.emptyState: No spaces found. Create one below.
spaceSwitcher.defaultTitle: Routing fallback when no WorkspaceBinding matches

staleBuild.title: Web admin UI is out of date
staleBuild.descriptionBefore: The served bundle does not match the running backend. From the repo root run

sourceBadge.confirmUserConfig: This will remove "{{serverName}}" from your config file. You can re-add it by editing the config file.
sourceBadge.confirmDefault: Are you sure you want to uninstall "{{serverName}}"? You can reinstall it from the registry.

connectIdes.title: Connect Your IDEs
connectIdes.description: are one-click; the rest copy a config you paste into their MCP settings. Either path ends with an approval prompt in this app.

vscode.name: VS Code
vscode.label: VS Code
vscode.nextStep: Opens VS Code and drops mcpmux into mcp.json. VS Code starts the server automatically — if it doesn't, open the Command Palette and run "MCP: Show Installed Servers", then click Start on mcpmux. The approval prompt lands on this page.

cursor.name: Cursor
cursor.label: Cursor
cursor.nextStep: Opens Cursor and adds mcpmux to its config. Cursor does not auto-start new MCP servers — go to Settings → Features → MCP (or the MCP Tools panel) and toggle mcpmux on. The approval prompt lands on this page.

windsurf.name: Windsurf
windsurf.label: Windsurf
windsurf.nextStep: Copies a JSON snippet. In Windsurf, open Cascade → MCP settings, paste mcpmux under mcpServers, and hit "Refresh" (or reload Windsurf). Approve on this page when Windsurf reaches the gateway.

claude-code.name: Claude Code
claude-code.label: Claude
claude-code.nextStep: Copies a `claude mcp add` command. Run it in your shell — Claude Code loads mcpmux on the next `claude` invocation (existing sessions need /restart). Approve on this page when it connects.

opencode.name: opencode
opencode.label: opencode
opencode.nextStep: Copies a JSON snippet. In opencode, paste it under "mcp" in opencode.json (project) or ~/.config/opencode/opencode.json (global), then restart opencode. Approve on this page when it connects.

jetbrains.name: JetBrains IDEs
jetbrains.label: JetBrains
jetbrains.nextStep: Copies a JSON snippet. Paste into the AI Assistant MCP config, then restart the IDE — JetBrains only reads MCP config on startup. Approve on this page.

android-studio.name: Android Studio
android-studio.label: Android
android-studio.nextStep: Copies a JSON snippet. Paste into Android Studio's AI Assistant MCP config, then restart the IDE. Approve on this page.

copy-config.name: JSON Config
copy-config.label: JSON
copy-config.nextStep: Copies a generic MCP JSON snippet. Paste into any MCP-compatible client and follow its reload instructions. Approve on this page when it connects.
